name: codex-thinkboard
description: Turn fuzzy intent into a clear map of wants, unknowns, evidence, and assumptions.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify what you want and what you do not know.
interface.longDescription: A friendly, high-reasoning dialogue that turns fuzzy intent into a living board of wants, unknowns, evidence, and assumptions.
defaultPrompt: Help me clarify a fuzzy idea with Thinkboard.
Map what I want and what I still need to learn.
Challenge the assumptions blocking my next decision.
